_note: DEATH-BY-HP-WRITE TEST, STEP 2 (any target) - HP=0 + KO FLAG. Same as death-test-anytarget.json but CauseDeathOnZeroHp=true: after forcing the target's HP to 0, also set the death/status bit found in Test 2a (struct +0x61 |= 0x20). Used because step 1 (HP=0 alone) left a zombie at 0 HP with only +0x30/HP changed. WATCH: does the target die now? Look for [DEATH-WRITE ...] lines confirming the flag write. Requires a NEUTERED basic weapon attack so vanilla is non-lethal. AffectAllies=true so any target works.

DeathStateWrites.Name: KO-0x61-bit0x20
DeathStateWrites._mask_hex: 0x20 = 32 dec (set on every death in Test 2a)
